videos.title: The Asset Mistake That's Keeping Most People From Building Wealth - Andy Tanner, Del Denney
info: How to build assets is one of the most important lessons in investing, yet many people spend years buying liabilities they mistakenly believe will make them wealthy.
advice: In this episode of Rich Dad StockCast, host Del Denney sits down with Andy Tanner to break down one of Robert Kiyosaki's core financial principles: the difference between assets and liabilities. Together, they explain why real wealth comes from owning investments that generate cash flow—not simply accumulating things that cost you money.
warning: What truly separates an asset from a liability
videos.key_idea: The Asset Mistake That's Keeping Most People From Building Wealth - Andy Tanner, Del Denney
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: The Hidden Money Trick That's Costing You More Every Year - Robert Kiyosaki
info: Why the U.S. keeps printing money isn't just an economic question—it's a question that affects your savings, investments, and financial future.
advice: In this episode of The Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki explains how modern money is created, why the Federal Reserve continues expanding the money supply, and what government "swap lines" really are. He argues that these emergency lending programs aren't simply about helping allies—they're designed to stabilize demand for U.S. debt and protect the financial system.
warning: What swap lines are and why central banks use them
videos.key_idea: The Hidden Money Trick That's Costing You More Every Year - Robert Kiyosaki

videos.title: Best of Richard Duncan: What Happens If the Dollar Loses Its Power? - Robert Kiyosaki
info: Dollar collapse has been a growing concern for investors as U.S. debt climbs, inflation remains persistent, and global power shifts reshape the financial system.
advice: In this episode of the Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki sits down with economist Richard Duncan, author of The Dollar Crisis, to examine the forces that could redefine the global economy. They discuss how massive government debt, quantitative tightening, inflation, and America's reserve currency status are influencing financial markets and why investors should pay close attention to these trends.
warning: Why Richard Duncan believes the U.S. faces increasing risks to the dollar
videos.key_idea: Best of Richard Duncan: What Happens If the Dollar Loses Its Power? - Robert Kiyosaki

info: Too late to start investing? Many people in their 40s, 50s, and beyond worry they've missed their opportunity to build wealth. According to Rich Dad expert Andy Tanner, that's the wrong question.
advice: In this episode of Rich Dad StockCast, host Del Denney sits down with Andy Tanner to discuss why financial success depends more on financial education than on age. They explain why so many Americans fall behind despite working hard, why traditional retirement plans often leave people unprepared, and what investors can do to change course.
warning: Why it's never too late to start investing

videos.title: Everyone's Buying AI. Smart Investors Are Buying This Instead. - Robert Kiyosaki
info: AI energy demand is creating one of the biggest investment shifts of the next decade—and most people are looking in the wrong place.
advice: In this episode of The Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki explains why the AI revolution isn't just about software, semiconductors, or chatbots. Every AI model, data center, and intelligent system depends on one critical resource: reliable electricity.
warning: Robert explores why the growing demand for AI could accelerate investment in energy infrastructure, particularly nuclear power and small modular reactors. Using Rich Dad principles, he explains why successful investors look beyond the headlines to identify the assets that make emerging technologies possible.
videos.key_idea: Everyone's Buying AI. Smart Investors Are Buying This Instead. - Robert Kiyosaki

videos.title: What Happens When You Tax the Rich? Dr. Art Laffer Explains - Tom Wheelwright
info: 👉 https://bit.ly/3HLA8ql 👈 CLICK HERE Ready to change your financial future? Join Tom Wheelwright, Robert Kiyosaki's CPA, and apply to the WealthAbility Accelerator today!
advice: The clarion call across the country right now is to "tax the rich." From California’s proposed wealth tax to the millionaire taxes in Washington and Massachusetts, proponents argue it’s about fairness. But what are the actual economic consequences when you punish productivity?
warning: Join Tom Wheelwright as he sits down with economic legend Dr. Art Laffer to dissect why progressive wealth taxes trigger catastrophic economic collapses, how history proves that lowering tax rates actually increases government revenue, and why redistribution always shrinks the total economic pie.
videos.key_idea: What Happens When You Tax the Rich? Dr. Art Laffer Explains - Tom Wheelwright
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: Is the Great Reset Happening? Mark Moss Explains What's Changing - Robert Kiyosaki
info: The future of money is one of the most important topics investors can understand today.
advice: In this special Best of Mark Moss compilation, Robert Kiyosaki sits down with investor, entrepreneur, and financial educator Mark Moss to discuss the forces reshaping the global economy. Together, they explore Bitcoin, central bank digital currencies (CBDCs), inflation, debt, monetary policy, and the growing debate over financial freedom in a rapidly changing world.
warning: Throughout these conversations, Mark explains why Bitcoin has emerged as an alternative to traditional monetary systems and how digital assets fit into a broader shift in global finance. He also examines the rise of CBDCs, the role of central banks, and the long-term implications of government control over money and financial transactions.
videos.key_idea: Is the Great Reset Happening? Mark Moss Explains What's Changing - Robert Kiyosaki
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: What Smart Investors Do While Everyone Else Is on Vacation - Andy Tanner, Del Denney
info: Summer investing strategies aren't just about what to buy—they're about how to think, prepare, and stay disciplined when market participation slows down.
advice: In this episode of Rich Dad Stock Cast, host Del Denney sits down with Rich Dad expert Andy Tanner to discuss what smart investors do during the summer while many people are focused on vacations, travel, and time away from the markets.
warning: Andy explains how seasonality influences different areas of the economy, why sector rotation matters, and how professional investors look for opportunities as money moves between industries throughout the year. He also breaks down how traders and long-term investors approach summer differently and why understanding market cycles can help investors make more informed decisions.
videos.key_idea: What Smart Investors Do While Everyone Else Is on Vacation - Andy Tanner, Del Denney
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: I Owe $1.2 Billion on Purpose (Here's Why It Makes Me Richer) - Robert Kiyosaki
info: Good debt vs bad debt is the difference between building wealth and staying stuck in the financial rat race.
advice: In this episode of The Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki challenges one of the most common beliefs about money: that all debt is bad. Drawing from lessons he learned from his Rich Dad, Robert explains why he intentionally uses debt to acquire cash-flowing assets and why he believes the wealthy understand debt differently than most people.
warning: Robert begins by explaining how the monetary system changed after the U.S. left the gold standard and why inflation affects savers and borrowers in very different ways. He then breaks down 10 ways debt can be used to build wealth, increase cash flow, expand investment opportunities, and acquire appreciating assets.
videos.key_idea: I Owe $1.2 Billion on Purpose (Here's Why It Makes Me Richer) - Robert Kiyosaki
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: The Most Expensive Financial Mistake You're Still Making - Robert Kiyosaki
info: In this episode of The Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki challenges the financial advice most people were taught growing up. Inspired by a recent study showing that many young adults rely on manifestation as a primary financial strategy, Robert explains why hoping for wealth is not the same as creating it.
advice: According to Robert, the biggest obstacle to financial success isn't a lack of money. It's a way of thinking. Most people spend years waiting for the perfect opportunity, a better economy, or a higher income before taking action. The wealthy take a different approach. They make decisions, acquire financial education, and consistently build assets that generate cash flow.
warning: How wealthy people think differently about money
videos.key_idea: The Most Expensive Financial Mistake You're Still Making - Robert Kiyosaki
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: Top Experts Warn: The Dollar's Biggest Threat Is Still Ahead - Robert Kiyosaki
info: The US dollar's reserve currency status has helped define the global financial system for decades. But as debt levels rise, central banks accumulate gold, and new economic alliances emerge, many investors are asking whether the dollar's dominance is beginning to change.
advice: In this special compilation episode of the Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki brings together insights from Andy Schectman, David Garofalo, George Gammon, Peter Krauth, and other financial experts to discuss the forces reshaping the global monetary system.
warning: Throughout these conversations, the panel examines the growing role of gold and silver, the expansion of BRICS nations, central bank buying trends, inflation, government debt, and the long-term implications of currency debasement.
videos.key_idea: Top Experts Warn: The Dollar's Biggest Threat Is Still Ahead - Robert Kiyosaki
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: Charlie Munger's Secret: Avoid Stupidity Before Chasing Success - Andy Tanner, Del Denney
info: Charlie Munger's investing principles have influenced generations of investors and helped shape one of the most successful investment partnerships in history.
advice: In this episode of Rich Dad StockCast, host Del Denney sits down with Rich Dad expert Andy Tanner to explore the mindset, discipline, and decision-making framework that made Charlie Munger such a powerful force behind Berkshire Hathaway's long-term success.
warning: While many investors focus on finding the next big opportunity, Munger focused on something different: avoiding mistakes, controlling emotions, and continuously learning. Andy explains why Munger believed success often comes from eliminating bad decisions rather than chasing brilliant ones.
videos.key_idea: Charlie Munger's Secret: Avoid Stupidity Before Chasing Success - Andy Tanner, Del Denney
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: Why Wall Street Suddenly Loves Crypto After Calling It a Scam - Robert Kiyosaki
info: What are stablecoins, and why are some of the world's largest financial institutions investing heavily in the infrastructure behind them?
advice: In this episode of The Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki explores the growing role of stablecoins in the evolving financial system and explains why institutional investors are paying close attention. He begins by examining the long-term impact of fiat currency, inflation, and the decline of purchasing power before tracing how Bitcoin emerged as a response to growing distrust in traditional financial institutions.
warning: But according to Robert, the bigger story may not be Bitcoin itself. The real opportunity could lie in the infrastructure being built around digital assets, particularly stablecoins and the companies helping move money through a new financi
